string.text: Investigate the complex
Return back
Kill the Controller
Talk to Fatty
Return to the village
Today we're going with Fatty to investigate the mysteries of the factory complex. Who knows what awaits us there? Important: we should hurry before morning.
Security Chief's Records

Completely useless records containing the names and signatures of all employees, who were repeatedly marked at the start and end of the workday. However, the dates suggest that this complex was used after the first explosion.
Production Information
Also of no particular value, nothing supernatural occurred here, apparently the employees of this plant were mainly engaged in energy issues.
Accounting Book

This contains the main information about accountable persons and the material structure of the new enterprise. The lion's share of the funds is allocated by the government. Unfortunately, no strange materials were found under management, weapons were definitely not a concern here.
PDA of a dead stalker

The PDA is in a damaged state, but a note was attached under the cover, apparently duplicating the last message for just this occasion: "Stalker, if you’re reading this – better leave while you still can. If you came here hoping to loot, know that there’s nothing here, though by the time you find this PDA, I think you’ll have figured that out. Don’t know if we’ll survive this night, but I have a really bad feeling. It’s like something is reading my thoughts and mocking us. We can’t go on with the guys, we’re falling down from exhaustion, taking a short break here. I’ll hide the PDA just in case, so mutants don’t tear it apart."
Find the rookie’s weapon
The stalker named Fatty asked me to find his weapon, which he dropped during a careless investigation of the anomalous substation.
Find the nuisance
Kill Alpha
Someone is annoying Fatty and he wants them gone. We need to help him with that.
Fatty: \nHey, stalker? Stalker! Help me please, there’s a bloodsucker trying to eat me from the neighboring house!
Fatty: \nThanks, man, come over here, I’ll open the door!
Fatty: \nListen, I think there’s something in that workshop, and also in this building in the middle of the complex.
Fatty: \nI’ve got a bad feeling, like someone’s messing with my brain...
Fatty: \nI’ve got chills from this place. Let’s check the checkpoint booth.
Fatty: \nLet’s get out of here as quickly as we can!
Fatty: \nListen, I don’t think there’s anything here, let’s leave before we end up like those poor guys.
Fatty: \nHoly shit, what a nightmare… who did this to them? Let’s check if they left any traces.
